patch.insert_text: - Continue metoprolol extended-release 100 mg for blood pressure and heart rate
added_claims: Metoprolol extended-release 100 mg is continued for blood pressure and heart rate

reasons: Insertion matches evidence: metoprolol ER 100 mg for blood pressure and heart rate.
No mention of metoprolol elsewhere in the note; not redundant.
Medication continuation belongs in Assessment and Plan (fits hypertension/cardiovascular management).
